# misp Provider

Manage a MISP (Malware Information Sharing Platform) instance as code.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    misp = {
      source  = "Scriptception/misp"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "misp" {
  url     = "https://misp.example.com"
  api_key = var.misp_api_key
}

variable "misp_api_key" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) MISP API key. May also be set via the `MISP_API_KEY` environment variable.
- `insecure` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification. May also be set via `MISP_INSECURE`. Disabled by default.
- `url` (String) Base URL of the MISP instance (e.g. `https://misp.example.com`). May also be set via the `MISP_URL` environment variable.
